*Last updated March 05, 2026. See more [here](contents/all-papers.qmd).*

- **[Fluctuations in the weakly coupled 4D Anderson Hamiltonian](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22509v1)** (Feb 26, 2026)
  Simon Gabriel, Tommaso Rosati

- **[Fast, High-Accuracy, Randomized Nullspace Computations for Tall Matrices](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16797v1)** (Feb 18, 2026)
  Ethan N. Epperly, Taejun Park, Yuji Nakatsukasa

- **[Finite Free Information Inequalities](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.15822v1)** (Feb 17, 2026)
  Jorge Garza-Vargas, Nikhil Srivastava, Zachary Stier

- **[Linear Systems and Eigenvalue Problems: Open Questions from a Simons Workshop](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05394v1)** (Feb 05, 2026)
  Noah Amsel, Yves Baumann, Paul Beckman, Peter Bürgisser, Chris Camaño et al.

- **[First Proof](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05192v1)** (Feb 05, 2026)
  Mohammed Abouzaid, Andrew J. Blumberg, Martin Hairer, Joe Kileel, Tamara G. Kolda et al.

- **[The matrix-vector complexity of $Ax=b$](http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04842v2)** (Feb 04, 2026)
  Michał Dereziński, Ethan N. Epperly, Raphael A. Meyer

- **[Macroscopic asymptotics in discrete beta-ensembles and random tilings](http://arxiv.org/abs/2601.16377v2)** (Jan 23, 2026)
  Gaëtan Borot, Vadim Gorin, Alice Guionnet

- **[Wasserstein distances between ERGMs and Erdős-Rényi models](http://arxiv.org/abs/2601.14170v1)** (Jan 20, 2026)
  Vilas Winstein

- **[Approximate FKG inequalities for phase-bound spin systems](http://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07169v1)** (Jan 12, 2026)
  Satyaki Mukherjee, Vilas Winstein

- **[van den Berg-Kesten--type correlation inequalities for disjoint polymers in the KPZ universality class](http://arxiv.org/abs/2512.17823v2)** (Dec 19, 2025)
  Shirshendu Ganguly, Milind Hegde, Lingfu Zhang
